calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption Of Vilma G. Marzan
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alisa J. Kim, Esq., T:510.736.6293, specially appearing for the plaintiff/moving party;
Vilma Marzan, defendant/claimant, appearing on her own behalf, with her sister Lorena Marzan, acting as interpreter.

RULING: After reviewing defendant's financial statement and hearing plaintiff's argument, the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR VILAM G. MARZAN'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is GRANTED. Plaintiff's opposition is denied. The levying office is directed to withhold $0.00 per pay period.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

ORDER SIGNED after hearing.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
The duplicate entry of PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Off calendar. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
